description: arunachal.gov.in hosts websites and digital public-service portals for the Government of Arunachal Pradesh. The documented integration surface found is the state's eHRMS human-resource management system API.
summary: arunachal.gov.in exposes one documented developer integration surface: the Arunachal eHRMS Web API, an HTTP API authenticated with HRMS-issued Basic credentials; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
